image_prompts.prompt: Hook visual: Bacteria evolve fast – faster than our antibiotics.
Context visual: This isn't just science fiction. It's happening now with antibiotic resistance.
Escalation visual: Every time we misuse antibiotics, we create selection pressure, speeding up the evolution of superbugs.
Evidence visual: The CDC warns that these superbugs could lead to untreatable infections worldwide.
Payoff visual: But there's hope. Good stewardship can slow this process. Use antibiotics wisely.
Cta visual: Stay informed, share this knowledge, and help fight antibiotic resistance.
